response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep Python/TypeScript proficiency, and direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling — aligning closely with the role’s AI-native engineering requirements. His operational ownership, open-source leadership, and cross-functional collaboration history further validate his fit. Minor concerns include limited explicit mention of LLMs and on-call incident response, but his track record suggests strong adaptability.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong ownership mindset evidenced by founding open-source platforms and leading dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No explicit mention of LLM or ML product experience beyond AI-agent tooling
Limited detail on incident response or on-call practices in past roles
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based teams

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit LLM/ML product exposure
